title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. cebennense
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. cebennense, also known as Cebennian Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Hieracium lachenalii subsp. cebennense can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
